function.name: SMILES_to_ADMET
function.description: Convert one single-molecule SMILES string into RDKit descriptors and descriptor-based heuristic ADMET proxy predictions. Reject mixtures and reaction SMILES.

smiles.description: A single-molecule SMILES string, for example CC(=O)Oc1ccccc1C(=O)O. Do not send mixtures with '.' or reaction SMILES with '>' or '>>'.
